pr.title: fix(tui): surface subagent retry status
pr.body: ## Summary - replace running subagent tool previews with a retry message when the child session is retrying - color retrying subagent previews with the error color - open the existing full retry-error dialog when entering a retrying subagent ## Test plan - `bun typecheck` from `packages/opencode` - `git diff --check -- packages/opencode/src/cli/cmd/tui/routes/session/index.tsx` example
pr.author: rekram1-node
